tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_animal_requirements module

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_animal_requirements.test_default_initialization() → None

Test the default initialization of the AnimalRequirements class.

This test checks that when a AnimalRequirements object is instantiated without any parameters, all its attributes are correctly set to their default values.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_animal_requirements.animal_requirements() → AnimalRequirements

Fixture to provide an instance of AnimalRequirements.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_animal_requirements.test_calc_pen_requirements_mean(animal_requirements: AnimalRequirements) → None

Test calc_pen_requirements using mean calculation method.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_animal_requirements.mock_requirements_lists() → dict[str, list[float | EssentialAminoAcidRequirements]]

Returns a mock dictionary of requirements lists.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_animal_requirements.test_set_requirements(animal_requirements: AnimalRequirements, mock_requirements_lists: dict[str, list[float | EssentialAminoAcidRequirements]], recalc: bool, expected_method: str, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test set_requirements with both recalculation enabled and disabled.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_animal_requirements.mock_pen() → MagicMock

Mock the Pen class.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_animal_requirements.mock_empty_requirements_lists() → dict[str, list[float | EssentialAminoAcidRequirements]]

Returns a mock dictionary of requirements lists with initial empty values.

tests.test_biophysical.test_animal.test_ration.test_animal_requirements.test_recalculate_requirements(animal_requirements: AnimalRequirements, mock_empty_requirements_lists: dict[str, list[float | EssentialAminoAcidRequirements]], mock_pen: MagicMock, animal_type: AnimalType, should_have_milk: bool, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test recalculate_requirements with various animal types.
